title: Super Mario Land 2: 6 Golden Coins
platform_style_description: Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation

environment: a compact Game Boy platform course with oversized coins, rounded blocks, and one tall toy-like landmark in the distance
action_mood_cue: caught in a buoyant leap toward the next platform
composition: single jumper only, side-view read, one clean jump arc, chunky portable terrain, and very strong Game Boy value separation

legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A short stocky jumper with a round nose, thick mustache, simple cap, and bright overalls in a compact Game Boy platform course with oversized coins, rounded blocks, and one tall toy-like landmark in the distance, caught in a buoyant leap toward the next platform.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
- always rendered as pixel art
- crisp pixel edges, readable sprite-like shading, and controlled dithering when useful
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- playful, portable, bright

Composition:
- single jumper only, side-view read, one clean jump arc, chunky portable terrain, and very strong Game Boy value separation
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- pixel art only
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid exact Mario face or costume details, avoid official enemy silhouettes, avoid exact coin iconography, avoid franchise logos, avoid resemblance to mario

generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
